data.title: Roche's Q3 Sales Surge Led By Ocrevus, Vabysmo, Urges Regulators To Block Novo Holdings' $16.5B Catalent Acquisition
data.description: Roche reported a 9% increase in third-quarter sales, driven by strong performance from Ocrevus and Vabysmo. Roche also raised concerns over the Catalent acquisition.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile Stock Is Rising After Hours: What's Going On?
data.description: AST SpaceMobile shares are trading higher in after hours Wednesday after the company announces it secured an initial contract with the Space Development Agency as a prime government contractor.

data.title: Boston Scientific Pauses Enrollment In Farapulse Study In Drug-Naive Patients With Irregular Heart Rhythm
data.description: Boston Scientific's AVANT GUARD trial evaluates the FARAPULSE PFA System for treating persistent atrial fibrillation, pausing enrollment to assess trial observations.

data.title: Lockheed Martin Analyst Spotlights Revenue, Free Cash Flow, Cautious About Conservative Growth Outlook
data.description: Lockheed Martin reported mixed third-quarter results, missing the consensus revenue estimate, but beating consensus on the bottom line. RBC Capital Markets analyst Ken Herbert offered insights into the defense contractor's report.

data.title: Tradepulse Power Inflow Alert: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. Climbs Over 9 Points On Session After Alert
